name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: JSON documents written as xframe/data/events/<provider_id>/<requested_model>/<iso-timestamp>_<rand>.json by appraisal (not rows in consolidated_data.json). Shape matches scripts/src/invocation-events.ts (InvocationEventFileBodyV1). token_usage.by_round[] aligns with each provider HTTP completion that reported usage.

entities.name: invocation_token_round
entities.brief: Token usage for one completed provider HTTP response within an invocation event.
entities.description: Snake_case fields align with Gemini usageMetadata and OpenRouter usage. round_index is 0 for the first completion, then increments per follow-up (e.g. each tool round). tool_use_tokens maps Gemini toolUsePromptTokenCount.

fields.name: round_index
fields.description: Zero-based order of this completion within the invocation.

fields.name: prompt_tokens
fields.description: Gemini promptTokenCount / OpenRouter prompt tokens.

fields.name: completion_tokens
fields.description: Gemini candidatesTokenCount / OpenRouter completion tokens.

fields.name: total_tokens
fields.description: Gemini totalTokenCount / OpenRouter total when present.

fields.name: thoughts_tokens
fields.description: Gemini thoughtsTokenCount when thinking models report it.

fields.name: cached_content_tokens
fields.description: Gemini cachedContentTokenCount when context caching applies.

fields.name: tool_use_tokens
fields.description: Gemini toolUsePromptTokenCount when tool-use billing is split out.

entities.name: invocation_token_usage
entities.brief: Aggregated token usage block on an invocation event file.
entities.description: Embedded under invocation_event_file.token_usage. usage_anchor is always the literal aggregate for this per-file summary object.

fields.name: usage_anchor
fields.description: Fixed discriminator for this summary object; appraisal writes aggregate.

fields.name: by_round
fields.description: Usage per completed provider HTTP response.

fields.name: totals
fields.description: Sum of numeric fields across by_round (missing keys treated as 0).

entities.name: invocation_event_file
entities.brief: Per-invocation appraisal log (one file per runInvocation finally block).
entities.description: Root object of each event file. Omit optional keys when not applicable: actual_model only when it differs from requested_model; token_usage only when at least one usage round was recorded; error_message only on status error with a message; output_text_chars only on status ok.

fields.name: recorded_at_iso
fields.description: When the file was written (ISO-8601).

fields.name: status
fields.description: Whether appraisal produced listing text.

fields.name: client_kind
fields.description: Appraisal client discriminator (e.g. google_gemini, openrouter).

fields.name: prompt_id
fields.description: Prompt template id (xframe/data/prompts/<prompt_id>.json).

fields.name: invocation_id
fields.description: prompt_invocation.invocation_id for this run.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: Provider that served the call.

fields.name: requested_model
fields.description: Model id from the invocation config (Gemini model id or OpenRouter route); must match llm_model.model_id when that catalog row exists.

fields.name: actual_model
fields.description: Upstream model when it differs from requested_model (e.g. OpenRouter free pool); omitted when identical or unknown. When set, should match llm_model.model_id for the serving route.

fields.name: char_counts
fields.description: UTF-16 code unit counts: user prompt in; model completion text out (0 on error or empty body).

composite.name: out
composite.description: Returned listing text length when status is ok; otherwise 0.

fields.name: turn_count
fields.description: Successful provider completions (each returned model message) during the run.

fields.name: function_calls
fields.description: Tool names in invocation order (may repeat); each value should match gemini_function_call.function_name when that declaration exists.

fields.name: token_usage
fields.description: Present only when at least one usage round was captured.

fields.name: error_message
fields.description: Present when status is error and a message was captured.

fields.name: output_text_chars
fields.description: Present when status is ok: UTF-16 length of returned listing text (0 when the model returned empty text).
